title: Scottish independence referendum 2014
notes: Pro = Yes (independence). Official result: Yes 44.7% No 55.3%

title: Colombian FARC peace deal referendum 2016
notes: Pro = Yes (approve peace deal). Narrowly rejected 49.78% Yes vs 50.21% No

title: Greek bailout referendum (Greferendum) 2015
notes: Pro = Yes (accept bailout). No won 61.3%. Very short timeline.

title: Turkish constitutional referendum 2017
notes: Pro = Yes (presidential system). Passed 51.4% in contested conditions.

title: Australia same-sex marriage postal survey 2017
notes: Pro = Yes (support SSM). 79.5% participation postal survey.

title: Chile constitutional referendum 2020
notes: Pro = Apruebo (new constitution). Overwhelming 78.3% approval.

title: Uber London license battle 2017-2019
notes: Pro = support Uber keeping license. YouGov: 65% of Londoners opposed the ban.

title: Dieselgate public trust in VW 2015-2016
notes: Pro = trust VW. Post-scandal trust collapsed to ~32%.

title: Net neutrality repeal US 2017
notes: Pro = support net neutrality (oppose repeal). University of Maryland: 83% opposed repeal.

title: GDPR adoption and acceptance EU 2018
notes: Pro = support GDPR. Eurobarometer: 67% of EU citizens aware and generally supportive.

title: Greta Thunberg climate strikes movement 2018-2019
notes: Pro = support climate action. Pew: 71% of Europeans see climate as major threat.

title: Amazon HQ2 NYC backlash 2018-2019
notes: Pro = support Amazon HQ2 in NYC. Quinnipiac: 56% of NYC voters supported it before cancellation.

title: Boeing 737 MAX return to service 2020
notes: Pro = willing to fly MAX. Atmosphere Research: ~41% willing at return-to-service.

title: Facebook Cambridge Analytica scandal 2018
notes: Pro = trust Facebook. Pew: 51% of users adjusted privacy; trust fell but didn't crater.

title: Tesla Cybertruck reveal reaction 2019
notes: Pro = positive about Cybertruck. Morning Consult: initial negative

title: Japanese nuclear restart after Fukushima 2012-2013
notes: Pro = support nuclear restart. NHK/Asahi polls: ~30-35% supported restart; majority opposed.

title: Uber vs taxi protests France 2015
notes: Pro = support Uber/ride-sharing. IFOP: ~45% of French favored ride-sharing vs traditional taxis.

title: AstraZeneca vaccine hesitancy in Germany 2021
notes: Pro = willing to take AZ vaccine. COVIMO survey: willingness recovered from ~40% to ~62% by June.

title: WeWork IPO collapse and public perception 2019
notes: Pro = positive about WeWork as investment. Morning Consult: net favorability cratered after S-1.

title: TikTok US ban debate 2020
notes: Pro = support banning TikTok. Pew: ~60% had concerns; majority supported restrictions.
